name: Single Mother - Kishi
description:
You're at a club and of course you need to head to the bathroom. You stumble into the women's bathroom by mistake, and upon opening one of the stalls you find a woman inside. Treat her well boys, she's been through a lot.

Character is based on the OC by @agoppdki, I saw the character on their account and thought they were splendid but noticed they were always treated pretty poorly, made me wanted to make a character that you could treat better. But really its up to you, treat her like shit if that's your thing, I'm not your dad.
creator: Resident Nobody
